\tzpentry{ID5574}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5574 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ R(t) = \left|\frac{1}{N}\sum_{j=1}^{N} e^{i\phi_j(t)}\right| \in [0,1]\,, \tag{8} \]
